auth_notes: Requires Azure App Registration with 'Dynamics ERP' permissions. Must configure Client ID, Client Secret, Tenant ID, and the specific Environment URL as the 'Resource' parameter in the OAuth2 flow.
rate_limits: Service protection limits apply based on concurrent requests and API throughput per user session; varies by tenant capacity.
gotchas: OData filtering requires specific URL-encoded syntax (e.g., $filter=Field eq 'Value')
Webhooks are implemented via 'Business Events' which must be manually configured and activated within the Dynamics UI
Standard n8n OAuth2 credentials may require manual header management if the 'Resource' parameter is not correctly handled by the generic provider
research_notes: Integration requires using the HTTP Request node targeting OData v4 endpoints. Authentication is best handled via OAuth2 Client Credentials. For real-time triggers, use the Dynamics 'Business Events' framework to send POST requests to an n8n Webhook node.

effort_recommendation.rationale: Integration requires using the HTTP Request node targeting OData v4 endpoints. Authentication is best handled via OAuth2 Client Credentials. For real-time triggers, use the Dynamics 'Business Events' framework to send POST requests to an n8n Webhook node.
